rationale: Gov't Code §1251.052 governs ballot form for political subdivision debt obligation elections. It is unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The ballot for a measure seeking voter approval of the issuance of debt obligations by a political subdivision shall specifically state:
_note: Rule text concerns debt obligation ballot form; proposed change concerns homestead exemption amount. No overlap.
